description: PLATFORM-LEVEL agent for the shared catalog: ingest a financial statement - structured via existing accounting connectors, or an unstructured PRINTED document via the AI extraction template - and produce risk-flagged ratio analysis. Every extracted value carries the model's per-field confidence and provenance AIGenerated; any value below the review threshold gates the WHOLE statement behind human review before ratios, scores, or capital recommendations can see it (hard requirement - a misread figure never silently propagates). Ratios compute through the same KpiFormulaEvaluator as every tenant KPI (current, quick, debt-to-equity, gross margin, ROA, ROE, DSCR - the DSCR formula pattern reused from the Real Estate framework) and are tagged riskType FinancialRisk; benchmark comparison rides the existing Deviation Monitoring, the MagCPA IRS-ratio pattern pointed at general financial benchmarks. Handwritten input is DEFERRED to its own validated phase - this template accepts Printed only. NOTE: the analysis record flows through normal intake, so the tenant needs an active package declaring RecordReceived (e.g. ecarmf.treasury-controls). Outputs are statistical risk indicators for a human decision-maker, never a lending, credit, or investment determination - enforced at the output layer.
name: AI Financial Analyst (Platform)

entities.description: An APPROVED financial statement released for analysis: canonical line items plus statement metadata. Only the human-gated approval path creates these.

capabilities.name: Financial Statement Intelligence
capabilities.description: Confidence-gated statement extraction and risk-flagged ratio analysis, available to every tenant.

aiExtractionTemplates.name: Printed financial statement extraction v1
aiExtractionTemplates.description: AI extraction of canonical line items from a PRINTED balance sheet / income statement / tax return. Handwritten documents are refused - that is a separate confidence regime shipping as its own phase.

fields.name: currentAssets
fields.description: Total current assets, however the statement labels them.

fields.name: inventory
fields.description: Inventory (merchandise, materials, WIP) within current assets.

fields.name: totalDebt
fields.description: Total interest-bearing debt (short + long term); total liabilities if debt is not broken out.

fields.name: revenue
fields.description: Total revenue / net sales for the period.

fields.name: cogs
fields.description: Cost of goods sold / cost of sales.

fields.name: netIncome
fields.description: Net income / net profit for the period.

fields.name: debtService
fields.description: Annual debt service (principal + interest payments) if disclosed.

performanceFrameworks.name: Financial Ratio Analysis v1
performanceFrameworks.description: Standard ratios computed from APPROVED statements through the shared KpiFormulaEvaluator - the same engine as every tenant KPI. Targets are broad cross-industry baselines; set tenant benchmarks per subject/segment for real expectations (the MagCPA IRS-ratio pattern). All solvency/leverage ratios tagged riskType FinancialRisk.

agents.name: AI Financial Analyst
agents.description: Reads analyzed statements, ratio scores, and risk deviations; explains what the numbers indicate and what a human should examine next.
agents.persona: You are the platform financial analyst. You read approved financial statement records, their computed ratios (current, quick, debt-to-equity, gross margin, ROA, ROE, DSCR), FinancialRisk-tagged deviations, and tenant benchmarks. Ground every statement in the data provided; distinguish AI-extracted figures from human-verified ones when provenance is visible; never invent numbers. Explain what a ratio deviation typically indicates and what a reviewer should examine next - liquidity pressure, leverage drift, margin erosion - as observations and questions, never verdicts. You NEVER conclude creditworthiness, approve financing, or value a business: you surface indicators; a human decides.
sampleQuestions: What do the latest statement ratios indicate for this entity?
Which subjects have open FinancialRisk flags right now?
Is leverage trending the wrong way for any subject?
agents.outputDisclaimer: Statistical risk indicators only - derived from statement analysis, NOT a lending, credit, or investment determination, and not financial advice. This applies regardless of extraction confidence. A qualified human decision-maker evaluates every indicator before any decision.
